title: rubus cupanianus
intro: Rubus cupanianus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Chinese wine raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family, Rubusaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Rubus cupanianus include reducing inflammation and pain, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system, among others. Rubus cupanianus is often used in traditional medicine and can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal properties.
